title: hackelia hispida var. disjuncta
intro: Hackelia hispida var. disjuncta, also known as beard penstemon or beard fleabane, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hackelia hispida var. disjuncta include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and burns. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal uses, and it is also sometimes used in folk remedies and traditional medicine.
